description.ko: KURO-X의 디지털 실체가 날카로운 기하학적 형상과 강렬한 글리치 아티팩트로 해체되는 모습을 시각적으로 형상화하여, 정형화된 가상 세계 속의 시스템 균열을 표현했습니다.
description.en: A visually striking portrayal of KURO-X where the digital entity dissolves into a cascade of sharp geometric shapes and vibrant glitch artifacts, representing a system breach in a stylized virtual world.

prompt: KURO-X character, cinematic lighting, geometric glitch art style, fragmented digital silhouette, sharp polygonal shards, neon cyan and magenta accents, chromatic aberration, pixel sorting effects, high-tech data corruption, 8k resolution, futuristic aesthetic, abstract geometric background
